title: Grey-Hull Fishing Fleet
text: A swarm of state-linked fishing vessels anchors inside your Exclusive Economic Zone, shadowed by a coast-guard cutter that refuses to acknowledge your patrols.
intent: A low-cost, deniable test of your tolerance for a grey-zone presence inside your EEZ. The Rival is reading your resolve cheaply — concede and the presence becomes permanent.

variants.title: Grey-Hull Fishing Fleet
variants.text: A swarm of state-linked fishing vessels anchors inside your Exclusive Economic Zone, shadowed by a coast-guard cutter that refuses to acknowledge your patrols.

variants.title: Maritime Militia Swarm
variants.text: Dozens of 'fishing' trawlers moving in synchrony raft together over a gas block inside your EEZ, ignoring your radio warnings to disperse.

variants.title: Survey Vessel Intrusion
variants.text: A Rival 'marine research' ship trails a sonar array across your EEZ under coast-guard escort, methodically mapping the seabed you claim.

variants.title: Squid-Light Flotilla
variants.text: A night flotilla lit like a small city works the grounds just inside your EEZ boundary, daring your under-strength patrol to react.

responses.label: Ignore it — not worth a confrontation in your EEZ.
Lodge a formal diplomatic protest over the EEZ intrusion.
Shadow them with your own coast guard.
Escort the fleet out of your EEZ and publicize it.
Board and detain the escorting cutter.

title: Frontier Air Incursion
text: Rival combat aircraft penetrate your Air Defense Identification Zone, testing your reaction time and rules of engagement.
intent: A test of your reaction time and rules of engagement in your ADIZ. It probes whether you will commit forces, not just words — and how fast.

variants.title: Frontier Air Incursion
variants.text: Rival combat aircraft penetrate your Air Defense Identification Zone, testing your reaction time and rules of engagement.

variants.title: Bomber Transit
variants.text: A pair of Rival bombers skirts the edge of your territorial airspace along your declared baseline, squawking nothing and forcing a scramble decision.

variants.title: Drone Overflight
variants.text: An unmanned Rival aircraft loiters over your ADIZ above a garrisoned feature, streaming imagery and ignoring your warnings on the guard frequency.

variants.title: Formation Probe
variants.text: A large Rival formation flies a track straight at your territorial sea, peeling away only at the last moment to clock your intercept timeline.

responses.label: Note it and stand down.
Protest and release the radar tracks publicly.
Scramble a proportionate intercept.
Establish a standing combat air patrol over the ADIZ.
Announce weapons-free rules on repeat incursions.

title: Customs Quarantine
text: The Rival declares a 'customs inspection zone' astride the sea lane to your forward islands — a soft blockade inside waters you administer.
intent: A challenge to your freedom of navigation through a sea lane inside your contiguous zone. It tests whether you will physically contest interference with your shipping, or reroute and accept the precedent.

variants.title: Customs Quarantine
variants.text: The Rival declares a 'customs inspection zone' astride the sea lane to your forward islands — a soft blockade inside waters you administer.

variants.title: Sanitary Cordon
variants.text: Citing 'biosecurity,' the Rival announces mandatory inspections of all shipping transiting the strait to your garrisoned features — chokepoint pressure by another name.

variants.title: Live-Fire Exercise Box
variants.text: The Rival closes a rectangle of sea across your main resupply lane for a week-long 'live-fire exercise,' effectively sealing the approach.

variants.title: Coast-Guard Cordon
variants.text: White hulls form a picket line across the contiguous-zone approach to your forward islands and begin turning back civilian traffic.

responses.label: Reroute your shipping quietly.
Condemn the lane closure and rally partners.
Run an escorted convoy through the lane.
Break the cordon with a naval task group.
Impose a counter-blockade of your own.

title: Disputed Feature Seizure
text: Rival marines land on an unoccupied disputed reef inside your EEZ and begin building a garrison. A textbook fait accompli.
intent: A fait accompli against a disputed feature inside your EEZ. It tests whether you will bear the cost of reversal — or protest on paper and ratify the new fact on the ground.

variants.title: Disputed Feature Seizure
variants.text: Rival marines land on an unoccupied disputed reef inside your EEZ and begin building a garrison. A textbook fait accompli.

variants.title: Low-Tide Elevation Grab
variants.text: Rival crews begin dredging and paving a low-tide elevation you claim, racing to manufacture an 'island' before you can respond.

variants.title: Lighthouse Planting
variants.text: The Rival erects a 'civilian navigation lighthouse' and raises its flag on a rock inside your territorial sea, then invites the press to film it.

variants.title: Fisheries Station Landing
variants.text: Under cover of a storm, Rival personnel occupy a disputed cay inside your EEZ and declare it a permanent 'fisheries administration station.'

responses.label: Protest on paper; accept the new fact.
Take it to international bodies.
Occupy an adjacent feature in response.
Blockade and isolate the garrison.
Retake the feature by force.
